activation_guardrails: Do not publish any campaign content from this package without a separate approval step.
Do not create, activate, schedule, or fund paid campaigns from this package.
Use this package for internal review, creative briefing, and planning only.
All claims, prices, discounts, landing pages, and product assets require approval before external use.

campaignPackage.concept: Der komplette Grooming-Auftritt: a premium Germany launch built around a simple beard-and-hair routine, with Beard Kit 3 IN 1 as the hero, Argan Beard Oil as the daily care upgrade, and Hair Wax as the finishing style product.

campaignConcept.name: Der komplette Grooming-Auftritt
campaignConcept.strategic_role: Position HAIROTICMEN as the practical premium routine for men in Germany who want a gepflegter Bart, controlled hair styling, and a confident everyday look without complicated product choices.
campaignConcept.core_message: Pflege, Form und Kontrolle in einer klaren Routine.
campaignConcept.customer_promise: A sharper daily look from beard care to hair styling, using real HAIROTICMEN products with premium masculine presentation.
campaignConcept.internal_review_note: Treat Hair Wax as Matte Wax Natürliches Styling unless the team confirms another wax SKU.

campaignPackage.targetAudience: Men in Germany who want a cleaner beard routine, a more controlled hairstyle, and premium grooming products that feel practical, giftable, and barbershop-ready.

audienceSegments.profile: Men 23-34 with short to medium beards who want a simple first serious routine.
audienceSegments.need: Clear steps, easy product choice, visible grooming improvement.

audienceSegments.profile: Men 28-45 who care about work, dating, social presence, and a controlled daily look.
audienceSegments.need: Low-effort confidence, clean beard, matte hair control.
audienceSegments.message: Ein Look, der morgens sitzt und abends noch wirkt.

audienceSegments.profile: Men 25-44 who follow barbers, haircut content, styling routines, and premium grooming recommendations.
audienceSegments.need: Professional-looking products, technique guidance, styling authority.

audienceSegments.profile: Existing grooming buyers who already use single products and are ready for a more complete system.
audienceSegments.need: Bundle logic, replenishment prompts, better product pairing.

audienceSegments.profile: Partners, family members, and friends buying masculine grooming gifts in Germany.
audienceSegments.need: Premium packaging, easy choice, giftable set clarity.
audienceSegments.message: Das Grooming-Set, das wirklich benutzt wird.

audienceSegments.profile: Barbers, stylists, concept stores, and grooming resellers looking for retail-ready men's products.
audienceSegments.need: Credible product range, clear margins, display-ready creative.
audienceSegments.message: Premium Maennerpflege fuer Verkauf, Beratung und Wiederkauf.

campaignPackage.offer: Hero Beard Kit 3 IN 1 as the routine anchor, Argan Beard Oil as the care upgrade/replenishment item, and Hair Wax as the style finisher. Pricing, discount level, coupon, and free-shipping logic remain approval-gated.

primary_offer.name: Complete Grooming Routine
bundle: Hair Wax / Matte Wax Natürliches Styling
primary_offer.role: Launch bundle for men who want beard care plus hair control.
primary_offer.approval_needed: Final bundle price, savings claim, coupon code, and availability.

secondary_offer.name: Beard Routine Starter
secondary_offer.role: Lowest-friction entry offer with clear three-step routine messaging.
secondary_offer.approval_needed: Whether to include limited-time incentive, free shipping, or gift positioning.

add_on_offer.name: Daily Finish Add-ons
bundle: Hair Wax / Matte Wax Natürliches Styling
add_on_offer.role: Cross-sell for customers who already own the kit or want targeted care and styling.
add_on_offer.approval_needed: Cart upsell placement and threshold rules.

partner_offer.name: Barbershop Starter Pack
partner_offer.role: B2B review angle for barbers, stylists, and resellers.
partner_offer.approval_needed: Wholesale terms, MOQ, partner margin, and contact flow.

products: Hair Wax / Matte Wax Natürliches Styling

key_points: 3-in-1 beard routine with shampoo, oil, and balm.
Position around cleaning, moisturizing, styling, and giftability.
Use as the main visual and landing page hero.

productDetails.role: Care upgrade, replenishment product, and ingredient-led proof point.
key_points: 50ml beard oil with argan oil positioning.
Use for softness, shine, comfort, and daily finish messaging.
Magnetbox variant can support gift or premium packaging creative if approved.

productDetails.role: Hair styling finisher for matte control and routine completion.
key_points: 150ml hair wax for matte finish, strong hold, structure, and control.
Use for business looks, everyday styling, and barbershop-style finish.
Confirm final Hair Wax SKU before creative production.

channels: Ads Manager draft planning only - no paid spend

launchPhases.name: Phase 1 - Internal Readiness
launchPhases.goal: Prepare the campaign for review without publishing or spend.
actions: Confirm Hair Wax SKU mapping and product availability.
Approve bundle economics, coupon rules, and shipping threshold before any public offer copy.
Lock German messaging pillars for routine, confidence, giftability, and barber-quality grooming.
Collect source-of-truth product packshots for Beard Kit, Argan Beard Oil, and Hair Wax.
Prepare draft landing page structure and tracking plan for internal QA.
Create ad copy and audience draft only; do not create live campaigns or budgets.

launchPhases.name: Phase 2 - Controlled Launch Draft
launchPhases.goal: Prepare the launch sequence for approval, with organic and owned-channel materials queued as drafts only.
actions: Draft 3 hero posts for Beard Kit, 2 care posts for Argan Beard Oil, and 2 styling posts for Hair Wax.
Draft one launch email, one follow-up routine email, and one add-on/cross-sell email.
Prepare short-form reel scripts showing morning routine, beard oil application, and matte hair finish.
Prepare landing page/product collection copy with no unapproved discount claims.
Hold all scheduling until publishing approval is granted.

launchPhases.name: Phase 3 - Review, Learn, And Activation Decision
launchPhases.goal: Use internal review and approved organic learnings to decide whether the campaign is ready for external activation and paid planning.
actions: Review creative clarity, product accuracy, compliance, and offer readiness.
Select the strongest two ad angles and strongest two content angles for next production pass.
Prepare paid-media-ready variants only after explicit approval; keep spend at zero.
Document blockers, required fixes, and go/no-go recommendation for leadership.
If approved later, convert draft-only handoffs into operational tasks.

adAngles: Complete routine angle: Beard Kit turns beard care into a clear three-step system.
Daily confidence angle: gepflegter Bart plus controlled hair creates a sharper everyday look.
Ingredient care angle: argan-led Beard Oil supports softness, shine, and a polished finish.
Matte control angle: Hair Wax gives structure and hold without a shiny or overloaded look.
Giftable premium angle: Beard Kit is easy to understand, premium to receive, and practical to use.
Barber-quality at home angle: products look and feel ready for professional grooming routines.
Bundle value angle: beard care plus hair styling in one Germany-market launch offer, pending approved pricing.
Partner/reseller angle: HAIROTICMEN can support barbershops and stores with retail-ready grooming products.
contentAngles: Morning routine tutorial: cleanse, oil, balm, then hair wax finish.
30-second grooming reset: quick beard and hair control before work or going out.
Product close-up education: what each product does and when to use it.
Barber POV: how a professional would recommend building the routine.
Ingredient story: Argan Beard Oil as the care step for softness and shine.
Matte styling demo: Hair Wax for structure, volume, and a natural finish.
Gift set story: a premium grooming set that feels useful, not decorative.
FAQ content: beard oil vs balm, when to use wax, how often to apply.
Retail/partner content: why the range fits barbershops, stylists, and grooming retailers.
requiredAssets: Approved product packshots for Beard Kit 3 IN 1, Argan Beard Oil, and Hair Wax with real packaging visible.
Hero bundle visual in premium masculine HAIROTICMEN style.
9:16 short-form video briefs for routine demo, beard oil application, and hair wax styling.
4:5 and 1:1 organic social statics for Instagram and Facebook.
German copy deck with captions, hooks, email subject lines, CTAs, and landing page sections.
Offer graphic template with editable price, discount, coupon, and free-shipping fields.
Email hero image and product blocks for launch and follow-up messages.
Landing page/product collection draft for the three-product routine.
Compliance review sheet for claims, ingredients, EU-cosmetics language, and promotional terms.
UTM and tracking matrix for owned, organic, and future paid channels.
missingBlockers: Final Hair Wax SKU must be confirmed; this package maps Hair Wax to Matte Wax Natürliches Styling by default.
Offer economics are not approved: bundle price, discount, coupon, and free-shipping threshold are still open.
WooCommerce integration currently shows an error for missing storeUrl, so live commerce data and offer validation may be incomplete.
Source-of-truth product assets for Beard Kit and Hair Wax need final approval in the brand asset registry before creative production.
Product inventory, fulfillment timing, and returns/service readiness need confirmation before launch approval.
Claims such as dermatologically tested, EU-compliant, paraben-free, and ingredient benefits need compliance signoff.
Landing page/product collection copy and product links need QA before external traffic is sent.
No paid media budget, audience setup, or campaign activation approval exists; Ads Manager work must stay draft-only.
Publishing calendar and email send plan require approval before scheduling.
Tracking, cookie consent, UTM naming, and analytics ownership need confirmation before activation.
blockers: Final Hair Wax SKU must be confirmed.
Offer economics and promotional terms need approval.
WooCommerce connection needs fixing if live product/order validation is required.
Approved product asset coverage is incomplete for full campaign production.
Claims, legal language, inventory, landing page QA, publishing approval, and paid activation approval remain unresolved.
nextActions: Confirm whether Hair Wax means Matte Wax Natürliches Styling or another HAIROTICMEN wax SKU.
Approve the offer structure: hero bundle, starter offer, add-on offer, and partner offer.
Approve exact pricing, discount, coupon, and shipping threshold or remove savings language.
Upload or approve source-of-truth packshots for Beard Kit, Argan Beard Oil, and Hair Wax.
Fix WooCommerce storeUrl configuration if the team needs live product/order validation.
Draft German copy pack in Content Studio for organic posts, reels, email, and landing page.
Prepare Media Studio briefs for bundle hero, product statics, and short-form routine videos.
Prepare Publishing calendar as draft-only with no scheduling until approval.
Prepare Ads Manager draft brief with angles, audiences, and copy; keep spend at zero.
Run internal review with brand, commerce, compliance, creative, publishing, and ads owners.
suggestedHandoffs: Content Studio: draft German launch copy, captions, hooks, email copy, landing page sections, and FAQ content.
Media Studio: create review-only briefs for product statics, bundle hero, reels, and email visuals using real product assets only.
Publishing: prepare draft calendar and channel sequencing only; do not schedule or publish.
Ads Manager: prepare draft-only campaign architecture, audiences, and ad copy; do not create paid spend or activate campaigns.

Content Studio.objective: Turn strategy into German-market copy assets.
deliverables: Launch email, routine follow-up email, and add-on email.
Landing page copy blocks and product FAQ.
Claim-safe CTA and offer copy variants with price placeholders.
guardrails: No final promotional claims until offer terms are approved.
Avoid unsupported medical, growth, or transformation claims.

Media Studio.objective: Prepare creative production briefs using approved HAIROTICMEN visual rules.
deliverables: Product close-up static briefs for Beard Kit, Beard Oil, and Hair Wax.
Offer template brief with editable pricing fields.
guardrails: Use real product and real logo only.
Do not redesign labels, packaging, or brand elements.
Keep product visible and avoid generic luxury visuals without product relevance.

deliverables: Draft calendar for organic Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, email, and website updates.
UTM naming plan for approved assets.
guardrails: Wait for explicit internal approval before activation.

Ads Manager.objective: Prepare paid media thinking without campaign activation.
deliverables: Draft campaign structure for awareness, consideration, and conversion.
Draft ad copy matrix by product and angle.
guardrails: All work remains a planning artifact until paid activation approval exists.

reviewChecklist: Strategy approval: concept, audience, phases, and channels.
Commerce approval: offer, pricing, bundle logic, inventory, and fulfillment.
Brand approval: visual direction, tone, product naming, and asset fidelity.
Compliance approval: claims, legal text, promotional terms, and privacy/tracking.
Publishing approval: calendar, channel owners, send/post dates, and rollback plan.
Ads approval: budget, account setup, audience rules, and campaign activation, if later requested.
